MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mook Changis present. Represented by Justin Siska.
Attorney, David Foran, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Hermion Juarez, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Posada, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.
